title: message_set update: body edit not capped at 65536 bytes
description: jmap.rs message_set create validates body.len() <= 65536, but the update path (patch body string) only checks value.as_str().is_none() (type check) in Phase 1 — no length limit. A caller can update an existing message with a body of arbitrary length. store.edit_message_body is called with the raw value from the patch. Trigger: Message/set with update:{msgId:{body:<multi-MB string>}}. Bad outcome: unbounded DB write for the body field.
close_reason: Fixed in round 34: body cap, forbidden error, unknown patch paths, description limit
